format-names.description: Install fmt and nameof dependencies for the default C++20/C++23 API surface.

tl-expected.description: Install tl::expected dependencies for the default C++20 expected backend.

std-expected.description: Use the C++23 std::expected backend without installing tl::expected.

stl-only.description: Use the C++26 std::expected/std::meta/std::format path without third-party runtime dependencies.

boost-pfr-names.description: Install Boost.PFR dependencies for the optional C++20 named-map reflection backend.

cwt-openssl.description: Install OpenSSL for the optional cbor::cwt_openssl CWT crypto backend target.

cwt-wolfssl.description: Install wolfSSL for the optional cbor::cwt_wolfssl CWT crypto backend target.

magic-enum-names.description: Install magic_enum dependencies for optional CDDL enum-name definitions.
